subject: Next route scout: P8 attention-state UI/test scope
body: Controller route for next P8 slice: please do a read-only scope scout for p8-attention-state, focused on interactive UI and component/CLI tests. Do not edit, claim implementation files, stage, enqueue, or commit yet. Inspect app/panes/controller/config/CLI test surfaces and reply with the smallest exact implementation scope and tests you recommend for showing unread/seen or equivalent directed-thread triage in the human TUI. Coordinate with Arboreal's data/value scout; no implementation until Pearly routes exact non-overlapping claims.
